name: 稳态
subject: biology
domain_name: A2 · 能量与稳态 / A2 · Energy & Homeostasis / A2 · Energy & Homeostasis
curriculum_points: 1.2 Cells as the basic units of living organisms (continued) Learning outcomes Candidates should be able to: 1 recognise organelles and other cell structures found in eukaryotic cells and outline their structures and functions, limited to: • cell surface membrane • nucleus, nuclear envelope and nucleolus • rough endoplasmic reticulum • smooth endoplasmic reticulum • Golgi body (Golgi apparatus or Golgi complex) • mitochondria (including the presence of small circular DNA) • ribosomes (80S in the cytoplasm and 70S in chloroplasts and mitochondria) • lysosomes • centrioles and microtubules • cilia • microvilli • chloroplasts (including the presence of small circular DNA) • cell wall • plasmodesmata • large permanent vacuole and tonoplast of plant cells
